quick_skim.title: T-SAR-JEPA: Self-Supervised Temporal Anomaly Detection in SAR Amplitude Stacks via Latent Prediction
quick_skim.abstract: We present T-SAR-JEPA, a self-supervised framework for temporal anomaly detection in SAR amplitude stacks via latent prediction. A ViT-Base/16 encoder from SAR-JEPA is domain-adapted on 39,300 Capella patches using local masked reconstruction with gradient feature prediction. A temporal transformer with sinusoidal time encoding forecasts future latent states from K=7 acquisitions, with progressive unfreezing substantially reducing validation loss. The model operates on amplitude alone; InSAR coherence serves exclusively as independent pseudo-ground-truth. On the DFC 2026 dataset (300 time-series, three AOIs), T-SAR-JEPA achieves ROC-AUC of 77.0% on the Hawaii eruption window, outperforming RX, PaDiM, Linear AR, and LSTM baselines (~50%). Spatial coherence of 99.9% (p < 0.001, permutation test) confirms structured detections. Code: https://github.com/TerraLatent/t-sar-jepa
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: self-supervised temporal anomaly detection in SAR with InSAR coherence as pseudo-ground-truth; relates to intelligent InSAR processing and automatic deformation interpretation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 在SAR幅度堆栈中通过潜在预测进行自监督时间异常检测；与智能InSAR处理和自动形变解释相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 在SAR幅度堆栈中通过潜在预测进行自监督时间异常检测；与智能InSAR处理和自动形变解释相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 在SAR幅度堆栈中通过潜在预测进行自监督时间异常检测；与智能InSAR处理和自动形变解释相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: T-SAR-JEPA uses self-supervised latent prediction on SAR amplitude stacks for temporal anomaly detection, with InSAR coherence as pseudo-ground-truth, achieving 77% ROC-AUC on Hawaii eruption data.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对SAR时间序列中异常检测任务，现有方法依赖大量标注数据且难以捕捉时间动态。本文提出T-SAR-JEPA框架，通过自监督潜在预测在SAR幅度堆栈上检测时序异常，利用SAR-JEPA编码器进行域自适应，并使用时序变换器预测未来潜在状态。在DFC 2026数据集上，该方法在夏威夷火山喷发窗口取得77.0%的ROC-AUC，优于多种基线，为智能化InSAR形变异常识别提供了新途径。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对SAR时间序列中异常检测任务，现有方法依赖大量标注数据且难以捕捉时间动态。本文提出T-SAR-JEPA框架，通过自监督潜在预测在SAR幅度堆栈上检测时序异常，利用SAR-JEPA编码器进行域自适应，并使用时序变换器预测未来潜在状态。在DFC 2026数据集上，该方法在夏威夷火山喷发窗口取得77.0%的ROC-AUC，优于多种基线，为智能化InSAR形变异常识别提供了新途径。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: intelligent InSAR processing with automatic deformation interpretation
